pause_point: All code executed + committed; verification human_needed; paused at the browser-UAT gate awaiting operator approval.

completed_tasks.name: Filter pipeline rebuild — search, dept-only, Near-due, computeCollDueRange
Filter-bar markup + Looker date popover handlers + popover CSS
Group-by state + grouped renderer + render-branch wiring
Group-by toggle button + handlers + window reg/teardown + grouped CSS

remaining_tasks.name: On all-pass: flip HUMAN-UAT + VERIFICATION to passed, mark phase complete in ROADMAP/STATE

blockers.description: Phase completion is browser-UAT gated — zero-build SPA has no functional test harness, so on-screen behavior must be confirmed by a human.
blockers.workaround: Run python -m http.server 8000, open Finance -> Collectibles, walk the 10 UAT items.

human_actions_pending.context: Confirms urgency sort order, search, dept dropdown, date presets + Fixed-range stale-clear, Near-due (<=7 & not overdue), Group-by accordion, intentional scorecard divergence, CSV 13-col filtered set, remount reset.
On approval Claude marks the phase complete; on failure -> /gsd-plan-phase 99.3 --gaps.

decisions.decision: Executed inline sequential on v3.3 (no subagents/worktrees)
decisions.rationale: gsd-sdk unavailable + 2 stale locked agent worktrees make the worktree/subagent path unsafe; both plans share finance.js + views.css so they must serialize anyway. Matches Phase 98/99/99.1/99.2 precedent.

decisions.decision: Near-due = getCollectibleUrgency tier 'near-due' (<=7 days AND not overdue)
decisions.rationale: Canonical D-08b definition; deliberately narrower than the spike's d<=0 && -d<=7 so the Plan-01 Near-due filter and the Plan-02 group near-due count agree (Fix-2).

decisions.decision: Grouped scorecard aggregates the pre-hide portfolio set (fully-paid included); flat scorecard stays on the post-hide set
decisions.rationale: Intentional portfolio-vs-active-list divergence (Fix-1) — documented so the Total Invoiced/Collected/Outstanding shift on toggle reads as design, not a bug.

decisions.decision: Grouped rows reuse the real 5-column table + coll-urgency-${tier} row-class border
decisions.rationale: Avoids a separate urg-bar cell / second <thead>; the existing data-table header serves both flat and grouped views.

uncommitted_files.note: Pre-existing, UNRELATED to 99.3 — do not commit as part of this phase.

next_action: Run python -m http.server 8000, open Finance -> Collectibles, and walk the 10 items in 99.3-HUMAN-UAT.md. Reply 'approved' to mark the phase complete, or describe failures to trigger /gsd-plan-phase 99.3 --gaps.
context_notes: Phase 99.3 (completes spike-027c filter/sort layer) is fully implemented across 8 commits (5 feat + 2 plan-SUMMARY + 1 tracking) on branch v3.3. node --check passes; every static grep gate met; window register<->teardown 5/5 symmetric; MD-01 destroy() resets in place. All 4 named fixes honored (Fix-1 grouped portfolio scorecard, Fix-2 canonical near-due, Fix-3 deterministic popover open-state with no display:'' close path, Fix-4 unconditional From/To input clear on non-fixed presets). No Firestore schema/rules change — the standing 87.4/99/99.1 rules-deploy + v3.3->main merge debt is unaffected. The ONLY remaining work is human browser-UAT. Inline code review of the 2-file diff found no correctness issues. Resume by collecting the UAT result, not by re-running code.
